title: Total Functions, Result Values, and Pattern Matching · Iterator Workshop
summary: Make a batch import explain every rejected record rather than aborting or returning ambiguous sentinels. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a typed parse-validate-result pipeline while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define outputs for every admitted input or narrow the domain with an explicit validation boundary.
Represent success and failure as explicit immutable variants with useful evidence.
Use structural pattern matching with guarded, ordered, and intentionally exhaustive cases.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
